nodes.label: Finetune SAM README
nodes.author: Hanxue Gu, Haoyu Dong, Jichen Yang, Maciej A. Mazurowski
nodes.rationale: Comprehensive empirical study of fine-tuning SAM for medical imaging across 18 strategy combinations (3 encoders x 2 components x 3 PEFT methods) and 17 datasets; key findings: PEFT in both encoder+decoder outperforms other strategies; SSL pretraining improves downstream performance; network architecture has small impact

nodes.label: Adapter Fine-tuning (PEFT)
nodes.rationale: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning by inserting lightweight adapter modules between transformer blocks; configurable per encoder block range (encoder_adapter_depths); can be applied to encoder, decoder, or both; preserves most original weights frozen

nodes.label: LoRA Fine-tuning (PEFT)
nodes.rationale: Low-Rank Adaptation applied to specified transformer blocks; trainable rank decomposition matrices injected into attention layers; configurable via encoder_lora_layer list; can be applied to encoder, decoder, or both

nodes.label: Vanilla Fine-tuning
nodes.rationale: Full parameter update of either encoder+decoder or decoder-only; controlled by if_update_encoder flag; highest parameter count but may overfit on small datasets
